channel.title: 1. Worklog :: Internship Report - Phan Thi Khanh Bang
channel.description: An overview of the internship and the development of the Smart Media Analytics project, broken down into weekly milestones with specific objectives: Week 1: AWS Basics: Familiarized with the AWS ecosystem, practiced core services, and surveyed project directions. Week 2: Lambda & VPC: Researched and configured Amazon VPC network infrastructure, Subnets, and AWS Lambda. Week 3: Project Orientation: Onboarded at the company, learned internal workflows, and defined the project direction. Week 4: Backend & Docker: Initialized the FastAPI Backend structure, practiced Docker packaging, and explored ECR/ECS Fargate. Week 5: Database & API: Integrated PostgreSQL and Redis databases, and finalized the design of core management APIs. Week 6: AI Pipeline & Testing: Deployed AI services via Docker, synchronized the development environment, and fully tested the Backend. Week 7: Vector Store & Media: Completed the asynchronous AI pipeline (Scene, Image Caption, Transcription) and integrated ChromaDB. Week 8: Frontend Init: Built the Frontend platform with React, managed centralized States, and made the first API connections. Week 9: Bedrock & WebSocket: Connected AWS Bedrock, handled real-time uploads via WebSocket, and optimized Vector Embeddings. Week 10: Dashboard & Audio: Built the Audio Waveform, finalized the interactive Dashboard, and adjusted AWS architecture based on feedback. Week 11: End-to-End & UI/UX: Connected the E2E AI pipeline, packaged for Fargate, and overhauled the UI to an App-like standard. Week 12: CI/CD & Deployment: Automated CI/CD, set up CloudWatch monitoring, and completed the comprehensive A-Z Workshop documentation.

item.title: 1.1. Week 1 Worklog
item.description: Duration: 17/04/2026 - 26/04/2026 Weekly task details: Day Task Start Date Completion Date Reference Material Monday Create AWS account and basic config 20/04/2026 20/04/2026 AWS Docs / Internal Tuesday Learn AWS services via labs 21/04/2026 21/04/2026 AWS Docs / Internal Wednesday Practice basic AWS labs 22/04/2026 22/04/2026 AWS Skill Builder Thursday Research potential projects 23/04/2026 23/04/2026 AWS Docs / Internal Friday Summarize info and report on project 24/04/2026 24/04/2026 AWS Docs / Internal

item.title: 1.2. Week 2 Worklog
item.description: Duration: 26/04/2026 - 03/05/2026 Weekly task details: Day Task Start Date Completion Date Reference Material Monday General research on AWS Lambda 27/04/2026 27/04/2026 AWS Lambda Foundations Tuesday Practice creating AWS Lambda functions 28/04/2026 28/04/2026 AWS Docs Wednesday General research on Amazon VPC 29/04/2026 29/04/2026 Amazon VPC Primer Thursday Practice configuring VPC and Subnets 30/04/2026 30/04/2026 AWS Docs Friday Combine Lambda and VPC in a lab 01/05/2026 01/05/2026 Serverless Land

item.title: 1.3. Week 3 Worklog
item.description: Duration: 04/05/2026 - 10/05/2026 Weekly task details: Day Task Start Date Completion Date Monday First day at office, get familiar with environment 04/05/2026 04/05/2026 Tuesday Attend internal company event 05/05/2026 05/05/2026 Wednesday Learn internal workflows 06/05/2026 06/05/2026 Thursday Discuss potential projects in the team 07/05/2026 07/05/2026 Friday Define direction for team project 08/05/2026 08/05/2026

item.title: 1.4. Week 4 Worklog
item.description: Duration: 11/05/2026 - 17/05/2026 Weekly task details: Day Task Start Date Completion Date Monday Start official office work 11/05/2026 11/05/2026 Tuesday Learn company rules and culture 12/05/2026 12/05/2026 Wednesday Deep discussion on final internship project 13/05/2026 13/05/2026 Thursday Search and collect data for project 14/05/2026 14/05/2026 Friday Filter and prepare raw data 15/05/2026 15/05/2026

item.title: 1.5. Week 5 Worklog
item.description: Duration: 18/05/2026 - 24/05/2026 Weekly task details: Day Task Start Date Completion Date Monday Attend 2nd event & Plan Agile Sprint 1 18/05/2026 18/05/2026 Tuesday Design API Data Contract and Schema 19/05/2026 19/05/2026 Wednesday Init FastAPI and Docker Compose 20/05/2026 20/05/2026 Thursday Assist in building AI media pipeline 21/05/2026 21/05/2026 Friday Build database and basic React frontend 22/05/2026 22/05/2026

item.title: 1.6. Week 6 Worklog
item.description: Duration: 25/05/2026 - 31/05/2026 Weekly task details: Day Task Start Date Completion Date Monday Deploy AI services via Docker 25/05/2026 25/05/2026 Tuesday Resolve dev environment compatibility 26/05/2026 26/05/2026 Wednesday Test FastAPI backend and database 27/05/2026 27/05/2026 Thursday Test and refine AI pipelines 28/05/2026 28/05/2026 Friday Standardize workflow for integration phase 29/05/2026 29/05/2026

item.title: 1.7. Week 7 Worklog
item.description: Duration: 01/06/2026 - 07/06/2026 Weekly task details: Day Task Start Date Completion Date Monday Complete AI Pipeline (Scene, Image Caption) 01/06/2026 01/06/2026 Tuesday Integrate Audio Transcription 02/06/2026 02/06/2026 Wednesday Integrate ChromaDB Vector Store 03/06/2026 03/06/2026 Thursday Build Ingest and Search APIs 04/06/2026 04/06/2026 Friday Test async media processing system 05/06/2026 05/06/2026

item.title: 1.8. Week 8 Worklog
item.description: Duration: 08/06/2026 - 14/06/2026 Weekly task details: Day Task Start Date Completion Date Monday Migrate to OpenAI Whisper & update Embedding 08/06/2026 08/06/2026 Tuesday Design UI on Figma (Dashboard, Upload) 09/06/2026 09/06/2026 Wednesday Build UI Components (React + Tailwind) 10/06/2026 10/06/2026 Thursday Unify AWS cloud architecture diagram 11/06/2026 11/06/2026 Friday Prepare AWS resources based on diagram 12/06/2026 12/06/2026

item.title: 1.9. Week 9 Worklog
item.description: Duration: 15/06/2026 - 21/06/2026 Weekly task details: Day Task Start Date Completion Date Monday Complete Asset Detail Page UI 15/06/2026 15/06/2026 Tuesday Integrate Asset API and Upload Video WebSocket 16/06/2026 16/06/2026 Wednesday Sync PostgreSQL and Redis data 17/06/2026 17/06/2026 Thursday Integrate Vector Embedding & Re-Ingest API 18/06/2026 18/06/2026 Friday Build AI Provider for AWS Bedrock 19/06/2026 19/06/2026

item.title: 1.10. Week 10 Worklog
item.description: Duration: 22/06/2026 - 28/06/2026 Weekly task details: Day Task Start Date Completion Date Monday Connect Dashboard with Backend API 22/06/2026 22/06/2026 Tuesday Integrate Audio Waveform (WaveSurfer.js) 23/06/2026 23/06/2026 Wednesday Improve Upload and WebSocket flows 24/06/2026 24/06/2026 Thursday Adjust AWS Services architecture 25/06/2026 25/06/2026 Friday Meeting with admin, feedback and optimize 26/06/2026 26/06/2026

item.title: 1.11. Week 11 Worklog
item.description: Duration: 29/06/2026 - 05/07/2026 Weekly task details: Day Task Start Date Completion Date Monday Complete the E2E AI pipeline and package Docker for AWS Fargate. Sync output files to Cloud Storage and save metadata/vectors to PostgreSQL. 29/06/2026 29/06/2026 Tuesday Expand Backend API for Video Streaming, video extraction, and dynamic Tags. 30/06/2026 30/06/2026 Wednesday Upgrade Asset Detail, integrate Auto-scroll Transcript, and fix UI bugs. Connect Dashboard with real API and finalize Loading Skeleton. 01/07/2026 01/07/2026 Thursday Optimize UI layout towards an App-like feel and improve UI/UX. Finalize the Settings page UI for the next Sprint. 02/07/2026 02/07/2026 Friday Redesign system architecture to be clean, scalable, and maintainable. 03/07/2026 03/07/2026

item.title: 1.12. Week 12 Log
item.description: Time: 06/07/2026 - 12/07/2026 Details of tasks during the week: Day Task Start Date End Date Monday Directly provisioned infrastructure including VPC, Subnets, and Security Groups on AWS. 06/07/2026 06/07/2026 Tuesday Built the AI processing workflow (SQS, Step Functions, Bedrock). 07/07/2026 07/07/2026 Wednesday Set up CI/CD with GitHub Actions to deploy the Backend to ECS Fargate. 08/07/2026 08/07/2026 Thursday Configured ALB (Load Balancer) and integrated Native WebSocket. 09/07/2026 09/07/2026 Friday Deployed the Frontend project to AWS Amplify and configured environment variables. 10/07/2026 10/07/2026 Saturday Drafted the comprehensive A-Z Workshop deployment guide. 11/07/2026 12/07/2026
